Join the Movement

Get Involved

There are many ways to be part of the change. Whether you volunteer, partner, or sponsor, every action counts.

How You Can Help

Ways to Make a Difference

Choose the path that fits your skills, resources, and passion for empowering girls.

Volunteer

Join our passionate team of volunteers and make a hands-on difference in the lives of girls across underserved communities. Whether you're a health professional, educator, communicator, or simply someone who cares, there's a role for you.

  • Community outreach support
  • Health education facilitation
  • Events and logistics coordination
  • Digital and communications support
Apply to Volunteer

Partner With Us

Strategic partnerships help us scale our reach and deepen our impact. We welcome organizations, businesses, and institutions that share our vision of dignity and equal opportunity for every girl.

  • Product donations and in-kind support
  • Co-branded outreach programs
  • Employee volunteer programs
  • Cause-related marketing campaigns
Become a Partner

Sponsor

Financial sponsorships fund specific programs, outreach events, and school visits. Sponsors receive full recognition across our communications, reports, and events.

  • School outreach sponsorship
  • Pad distribution drives
  • Annual events and campaigns
  • Named impact recognition
Sponsor a Program
Collaboration

Partnership Opportunities

We work with a wide range of organizations who share our commitment to girls' education and menstrual health equity.

Corporate Partnerships

Align your CSR strategy with measurable impact. We provide detailed reports, co-branding opportunities, and employee engagement programs for corporate partners.

Schools & Institutions

Invite Pad Up Foundation to your school for outreach events, menstrual health workshops, and pad distribution programs tailored for your students.

Community Organizations

We partner with local NGOs, community groups, and faith-based organizations to extend our reach into communities we wouldn't otherwise access.

International Partners

We welcome relationships with international development organizations, foundations, and diaspora groups who want to create lasting change in Nigerian communities.

Let's Talk

Send Us an Inquiry

Ready to make a difference? Fill out the form below and our partnerships team will be in touch within 48 hours at partnerships@padupfoundation.org.

Ending period poverty and empowering every girl's potential through menstrual hygiene support, education, and advocacy.
